errors.unexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Cannot reach the server. Check your connection and try again.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 10 characters.
validation.passwordMax: Password must be at most 200 characters.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.description: Start documenting your APIs in minutes
signup.success: Account created. We sent a verification link to {{email}} — check your inbox.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.description: We'll email you a reset link
forgot.done: If an account exists for that address, a reset link is on its way.

reset.title: Choose a new password
reset.description: Your new password signs you out of all other sessions
reset.success: Password updated. You can sign in with it now.
reset.invalidToken: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
reset.missingToken: This page needs the link from your email.

verify.title: Email verification
verify.success: Your email is verified. You can sign in now.
verify.invalidToken: This verification link is invalid or has expired.
verify.resendPrompt: Enter your email to receive a new link.
verify.resent: If an account exists for that address, a new link is on its way.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noDocuments: No documents yet. Create your first one to get started.
dashboard.activityPlaceholder: Activity will appear here in an upcoming phase.

common2.saveFailed: Could not save. Please try again.
common2.deleteFailed: Could not delete. Please try again.

documents.title: Documents
documents.name: Name
documents.slugHint: Used in the public URL. Leave blank to derive from the name.
documents.deleteConfirmBody: This permanently deletes “{{name}}” and all of its versions, endpoints and content. This cannot be undone.
documents.slugTaken: A document with this slug already exists.
documents.emptyHint: Create your first API document to start adding endpoints.

overview.title: Overview
overview.brandingPlaceholder: Logo and theme customization arrives in a later phase.
overview.publishHint: Publishes the current draft so consumers can see it.

categories.title: Categories
categories.name: Name
categories.empty: No categories yet. Group your endpoints by adding one.
categories.deleteConfirm: Delete this category? Its endpoints stay but become uncategorized.

endpoints.title: Endpoints
endpoints.emptyHint: Add your first endpoint to document this API.
endpoints.duplicate: An endpoint with this method and path already exists.
endpoints.readOnlyBanner: This version is {{status}} and cannot be edited. Create a new draft to make changes.

codeSamples.placeholder: Generated code samples arrive in a later phase.

import.title: Import
import.pastePlaceholder: Paste your OpenAPI / Postman JSON or a curl command…
import.parseFailed: Could not parse the content. Check the format and try again.

tryit.title: Try It
tryit.noEnvironments: Add an environment (base URL) on the Overview page to try this endpoint.
tryit.productionWarning: This is a production environment — requests hit the live API.
tryit.truncated: Response truncated to the size limit.
tryit.quotaExhausted: Daily Try It limit reached. Try again tomorrow.

environments.title: Environments
environments.description: Base URLs used by Try It (test / staging / prod).
environments.name: Name
environments.empty: No environments yet. Add one so endpoints can be tried.
environments.readOnly: Publish a new draft to change environments — this version is read-only.
